name: AKS cluster RBAC disabled
description: Kubernetes RBAC is disabled on this AKS cluster. Without RBAC, all authenticated users have unrestricted access to the Kubernetes API, making it impossible to enforce least-privilege access controls within the cluster.
remediation: Enable Kubernetes RBAC on the cluster. Create namespaced RoleBindings and ClusterRoleBindings to grant least-privilege access. Integrate with Azure AD for identity-based RBAC. Note: enabling RBAC on an existing cluster requires a cluster upgrade.
